column1: # HAND-AUTHORED TEST FIXTURE — NOT REAL BanRep/Dune DATA.
# This CSV is the golden fixture for the Task-11.B weekly on-chain flow
# and DOES NOT touch any real on-chain data.
#   * Exactly 5 Friday-anchored complete weeks of 7 days each.
# Week-by-week edge cases exercised (week labels are the Friday-end date):
#     cCOP columns are empty (NaN) per Task-11.A pre-launch contract.
#     COPM directional signs are arranged so positive-day count = 3 and
#     Tests the "cCOP columns properly ignored; COPM-only aggregation still
#   * Week ending 2024-11-01 — TRANSITION WEEK. First 5 days (10-26..10-30)
#     are still pre-cCOP-launch (cCOP columns NaN); last 2 days (10-31
#     11-01) are post-launch with cCOP values present. Every day's
#   * Week ending 2024-11-08 — EQUAL-FLOW WEEK (post-cCOP). All 7 days
#   * Week ending 2024-11-15 — SINGLE-SPIKE WEEK. 6 days all zero; Friday
#     11-15 carries the entire week's flow (copm_mint_usd=700). This
#     Six zero-flow days contribute 0 to both positive and negative counts
# Boundary (<7 days) behavior is exercised by the test suite via an
# inline slicing of this fixture; no boundary row is authored here.
# Provenance: this fixture is entirely synthetic. The real-data Task-11.A
# → 2026-04-24) is NOT used by these unit tests — the whole point of the
# golden-fixture discipline is to pin channel arithmetic independently of
# Dune query drift. Downstream end-to-end tests on the real fixture live
